TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jamaica, title = Jamaica, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jamaica} }

S.FORM: Jamaica hya' ga cyux maki' tay 18 15 N, 77 30 W na cung-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 10,991 sq km (maki' tay 168ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 10,831 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 160 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 2,970,340. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 41.40% , lhlahuy hya' ga 31.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 27.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kingston. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Jamaica hya' ga cyux maki' tay 18 15 N, 77 30 W na cung-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 10,991 sq km (maki' tay 168ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 10,831 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 160 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 2,970,340. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 41.40% , lhlahuy hya' ga 31.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 27.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kingston. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: *amai ¶~ ®a ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** w na ¶~ ®uŇč-me ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a kiŇčs~…ēton. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a elizaő≤etńß ii, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
